characters.name: 乔晚
characters.desc: 穿进小说成为白月光替身的现代人，外柔内刚，表面乖巧实则腹黑吐槽。最大的优点是认命，但被不断刷新底线后也会爆发。
characters.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character: a young woman around 18, delicate features with a hint of mischief in her eyes, long black hair loosely tied, wearing pure white robes of a cultivation sect, a jade storage pendant at her waist, standing on a misty mountain peak at dawn, ethereal lighting, watercolor ink wash style

characters.name: 周衍
characters.desc: 昆山派掌门，修为深不可测。外表冷峻严肃，实则对乔晚有着复杂难言的情感。烧毁替身契约、封她为道侣的始作俑者。
characters.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait: a tall handsome man in his late twenties, wearing elaborate dark blue and silver sect master robes, long black hair partially tied up with an imperial crown, stern expression but with deep eyes, standing before an ancient hall, misty mountains background, traditional Chinese painting style, dramatic side lighting

characters.name: 陆辟寒
characters.desc: 沧澜宗少主，桀骜不驯的天才剑修。一开始对乔晚不屑一顾，后来不知为何态度大转弯，动不动就要跟周衍决斗。
characters.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait: a handsome young man with sharp features, wearing dark frost-patterned robes, carrying an ice-blue longsword, cold and proud expression, long black hair flowing, standing on a snowy mountain peak, winter mist, traditional ink wash painting style, cool blue tones

characters.name: 马怀真
characters.desc: 昆山二师兄，懒散外表下藏着惊人洞察力。少数几个不对乔晚另眼相看的人，总是在她最需要的时候出现。
characters.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait: a young man with a relaxed smile, wearing casual green and white disciple robes, carrying a gourd of wine at his waist, with a mischievous glint in his eyes, sitting lazily on an ancient tree branch, dappled sunlight filtering through leaves, traditional Chinese painting style

characters.name: 穆笑笑
characters.desc: 传说中的白月光，所有人的目光本该追随她。但她死后一切都乱了。乔晚总觉得穆笑笑的影子无处不在——她是谜，也是钥匙。
characters.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait: an ethereally beautiful young woman, ghostly pale, wearing flowing white and pink silk robes, with a melancholic smile, surrounded by falling cherry blossom petals, soft dreamy lighting, traditional Chinese painting style, slightly translucent effect suggesting a memory or spirit
